member.name: T:RealEstateStar.Workers.Shared.ActivityBase
member.summary: Lightweight base for Activities that provides consistent OTel span creation, timing, and structured start/end logging. Used by new Activities only — existing Activities are not retrofitted.

member.name: M:RealEstateStar.Workers.Shared.ActivityBase.#ctor(System.Diagnostics.ActivitySource,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger,System.String)
member.summary: Lightweight base for Activities that provides consistent OTel span creation, timing, and structured start/end logging. Used by new Activities only — existing Activities are not retrofitted.

member.name: T:RealEstateStar.Workers.Shared.InMemoryActivationQueue
member.summary: In-memory activation queue for local development. Messages do not survive restarts. Implements using an unbounded Channel.

member.name: T:RealEstateStar.Workers.Shared.InMemoryLeadOrchestrationQueue
member.summary: In-memory lead orchestration queue for local development. Messages do not survive restarts. Implements using an unbounded Channel.
